content: The nature of knowledge acquisition involves dialectical synthesis between empirical observation and a priori reasoning. This framework extends Kantian epistemology by incorporating modern theories of justified true belief and Gettier problems, while addressing the challenge of radical skepticism through coherentist foundations.
